hero_badge: AI Video Platform for TikTok Shop
hero_subtitle: Upload a product image, pick an AI engine, get a video ready to post.
tools_subtitle: Three powerful tools to find, validate, and sell winning products.
tool_trending_desc: Discover what's selling on TikTok Shop right now.
tool_trending_hero: Discover trending products to create videos
tool_trending_hero_sub: Browse trending TikTok Shop products by category and generate videos with one click.
tool_trending_step1_desc: Pick from 10 categories like Tech, Fashion, Skincare, and more.
tool_trending_step2_desc: See prices, sold counts, and shop names at a glance.
tool_trending_step3_desc: One click to create a professional video from any trending product.
tool_sellers_desc: Top TikTok Shop sellers — curated and open to new vendors.
tool_sellers_hero: Learn from the best TikTok Shop sellers
tool_sellers_hero_sub: Explore top sellers curated by our team. Vendors can also feature their store here to reach more creators.
tool_sellers_step1_desc: Curated list of top-performing TikTok Shop sellers.
tool_sellers_step2_desc: Ratings, followers, sales volume, and product count.
tool_sellers_step3_desc: Dive into any seller's catalog to find winning products.
tool_validation_desc: Check sales potential and violation risk before creating.
tool_validation_hero_sub: Paste any TikTok product URL to check if it sells well and if it's safe to promote — avoid bans and violations.
tool_validation_step1_desc: Drop any TikTok Shop product link.
tool_validation_step2_desc: AI analyzes demand, safety, social engagement, and content potential.
tool_validation_step3_desc: Make informed decisions and generate videos from validated products.
models_subtitle: Four engines, each tuned for different quality, speed, and cost.
model_engine_desc: Fast and reliable. Ideal for high-volume product videos.
model_ultra_desc: Cinematic motion with smooth transitions. Powered by Sora 2.
model_prime_desc: Highest visual quality. Ideal for premium campaigns.
model_advanced_desc: Best balance of quality and speed for demanding creators.
sim_subtitle: See how many videos you can generate with each engine.
sim_compare_subtitle: Side-by-side breakdown of all four engines.
updates_subtitle: Auto-synced from our repositories — multiple updates every day.
updates_page_subtitle: Complete changelog auto-synced from our repositories.
social_desc: Share videos, discover product ideas, and trade TikTok Shop accounts — all inside Genfy.
cta_subtitle: Join creators and sellers using Genfy to produce professional AI videos.
footer_tagline: AI video platform for TikTok Shop sellers and creators.
